docket_entries.description: ORDER TO DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE AS PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,336.60 FILED BY PANG, GEORGE AS TO DEFENDANT CRATUS, INC CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-30-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2026 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-20-2026 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF GEORGE PANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CRATUS, INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LIEM FINNEGAN, PRESIDENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY RYON HAYWARD OF CITY ATTORNEY'S OFFICE. PARTIES MET WITH THE MEDIATORS AND A SETTLEMENT IS PENDING. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE FEB-20-2026 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PROOFS OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH M. FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMEMT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANTS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJUEETH; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.(SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
